review_scope: CI/CD workflow 与发布自动化

command: Branch Review Gate 通过：已审查 origin/main...HEAD 的完整 diff，当前 HEAD e7803543b60951e6702fe7b3e637461dea802aef 覆盖 issue #9 的 dogfood overlay 同步、只读 drift check、维护文档、任务归档 artifact 与 review-gate metadata，未发现 P0/P1/P2/P3 finding。

Diff range: origin/main...HEAD，base=main，head=e7803543b60951e6702fe7b3e637461dea802aef；覆盖 .agents/.codex/.cursor/.claude dogfood overlay、.trellis/guru-team/config-template.yml、README/AGENTS/workflow/spec、check-dogfood-overlay-drift.sh、归档 task artifacts 与 review-gate.json metadata。
已运行 trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/bash/check-dogfood-overlay-drift.sh，结果为 dogfood overlay copies match canonical Guru Team overlays；canonical overlay 与 dogfood installed copy 当前无漂移。

验证通过：python3 -m json.tool trellis/index.json；bash -n trellis/workflows/guru-team/scripts/bash/*.sh trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/bash/*.sh；python3 -m py_compile trellis/workflows/guru-team/scripts/python/guru_team_trellis.py trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/python/apply_guru_team_trellis_preset.py；python3 ./.trellis/scripts/task.py validate .trellis/tasks/07-03-9-keep-dogfood-installed-overlays-in；git diff --check origin/main...HEAD。

开箱即用门禁：此前已运行 verify-throwaway-install.sh，临时仓库可通过 trellis init -y --workflow guru-team --workflow-source gh:castbox/guru-trellis/trellis 初始化、apply preset，并通过 check-env --json；归档提交只移动 Trellis task evidence，不改变实现代码。

Docs SSOT：本仓库没有 docs/ 目录；长期维护规则已合并到 README.md、trellis/presets/guru-team/README.md、AGENTS.md、trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md、.trellis/workflow.md 与 .trellis/spec。归档 task artifact 和 review-gate.json 仅保留 issue #9 执行证据。
部署影响：本次 diff 未修改 .github/workflows、Dockerfile、Docker Compose、Kubernetes/Kustomize/Helm、数据库 migration、Makefile；没有新增运行服务、API、worker、队列消费者、migration entrypoint 或 runtime config，故无需部署资产同步。
Issue Scope Ledger 覆盖 close_issues=[#9]，验收证据已记录 apply preset、drift check、throwaway install 和验证命令结果；无 related_issues 或 followup_issues。

close_issues_reviewed.title: Keep dogfood installed overlays in sync with canonical preset overlays

deployment_impact.review_instruction: 当本次 diff 改变部署资产，或业务/API/CLI/worker/runtime 形态可能变化但部署资产未改时，review evidence 必须说明 CI/CD、容器、Compose、K8s/Kustomize、migration、Makefile 是否需要同步调整；如果不需要，必须给出不需要的理由。
